gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId GROUP BY T1.Id ORDER BY SUM(T1.Score) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T2.Id) 
FROM posts AS T1 
INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId 
WHERE T1.Score = (SELECT MAX(Score) FROM posts)
question: How many comments were added to the post with the highest score?
